meaning: n.[植]景天科拟石莲花属植物(产于热带美洲)
examples: Echeveria agavoides grows in a certain area of Mexico.
Of interest as the only echeveria native to the USA. It is also one of the more difficult species to cultivate.
E. affinis, the "black" Echeveria, gives the new plant its color, and E. shaviana gives the plant its delicacy.
